---
title: "Cleaning and Analysis BRFSS 2017, 2019, 2022 Family Planning and Vaccines"
author: "Esmma Almousa"
date: "2026-04-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(haven)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
#yr2011 <- read_xpt("LLCP2011.XPT") #SEX, AGE, FLUSHOT5, TYPCNTR6
yr2017 <- read_xpt("LLCP2017.XPT") #SEX, _AGEG5YR, FLUSHOT6, TYPCNTR7
yr2019 <- read_xpt("LLCP2019.XPT") # _SEX, #AGE_80, TYPCNTR8, FLUSHOT7
yr2022 <- read_xpt("LLCP2022.XPT") # _SEX, #AGE_80, BRTHCNT4, FLUSHOT7

# age, race, education, insurance, martial status, urban/rural, employment

yr2017["race"]
```



```{r}
#yr2011upd <- yr2011 %>% select(SEX,AGE,TYPCNTR6,FLUSHOT5) %>%  rename(BRTHCNT = TYPCNTR6,FLUSHOT = FLUSHOT5 ) %>% 
#   mutate(BRTHCNT = case_when(
#    BRTHCNT == 1 ~ 1,
#    BRTHCNT == 2 ~ 2,
#    BRTHCNT == 3 ~ 3,
#    BRTHCNT %in% c(4, 5, 6) ~ 4,
#    BRTHCNT == 8 ~ 6,
#    BRTHCNT %in% c(11, 13) ~ 7,
#    BRTHCNT == 14 ~ 9,
#    BRTHCNT == 15 ~ 10,
#    TRUE ~ 99
#  ))
# 2011 contraception
#1~1
#2~2
#3~3
#4 or 5 or 6 ~ 4
#8 ~ 6
# 11 or 13 ~ 7
# 14 ~ 9
# 15 ~ 10
# else ~ 99
yr2017upd <- yr2017 %>%
  select(EDUCA, EMPLOY1, MARITAL, INCOME2,HLTHCVR1,'_AGEG5YR', `_PRACE1`,SEX,TYPCNTR7,FLUSHOT6,HLTHPLN1,HLTHPLN1) %>% 
  rename(AGE = `_AGEG5YR`)%>%  rename(BRTHCNT = TYPCNTR7,FLUSHOT = FLUSHOT6) %>% 
     mutate(BRTHCNT = case_when(
    BRTHCNT == 1 ~ 1,
    BRTHCNT == 2 ~ 2,
    BRTHCNT == 3 ~ 3,
    BRTHCNT %in% c(4, 5, 6) ~ 4,
    BRTHCNT == 8 ~ 6,
    BRTHCNT %in% c(11, 13) ~ 7,
    BRTHCNT == 14 ~ 9,
    BRTHCNT == 15 ~ 10,
    TRUE ~ 99
  )) %>% 
  #education - EDUCA
  #employment - employ1
  #marital = MARITAL
  #income - INCOME2
  #insurance - HLTHCVR1
  # age - AGE
  #race - mrace1
   mutate(Year = 2017) %>% 
    mutate(EDUCA = case_when(
    EDUCA %in% c(1) ~ "did not complete highschool",
    EDUCA %in% c(2) ~ "completed highschool", 
    EDUCA %in% c(3) ~ "some college", 
    EDUCA %in% c(4) ~ "college graduate",
  )) 
# 2017 contraception 
#1~1
#2~2
#3~3
#4 or 5 or 6 ~ 4
#8 ~ 6
# 11 or 13 ~ 7
# 14 ~ 9
# 15 ~ 10

yr2019upd <- yr2019 %>% 
  select(,EDUCA, EMPLOY1, MARITAL, INCOME2,HLTHCVR1,'_AGEG5YR', `_PRACE1`,'_SEX',TYPCNTR8,FLUSHOT7,HLTHPLN1) %>% 
  rename(SEX = `_SEX`, AGE = `_AGEG5YR`) %>% rename(BRTHCNT = TYPCNTR8,FLUSHOT = FLUSHOT7) %>% 
     mutate(BRTHCNT = case_when(
    BRTHCNT == 1 ~ 1,
    BRTHCNT == 2 ~ 2,
    BRTHCNT == 3 ~ 3,
    BRTHCNT %in% c(4, 5, 6) ~ 4,
    BRTHCNT == 8 ~ 6,
    BRTHCNT %in% c(11, 13) ~ 7,
    BRTHCNT == 14 ~ 9,
    BRTHCNT == 15 ~ 10,
    TRUE ~ 99
  )) %>% 
  mutate(Year = 2019) %>% 
  # 2019
    mutate(EDUCA = case_when(
    EDUCA %in% c(1,2,3) ~ "did not complete highschool",
    EDUCA %in% c(4) ~ "completed highschool", 
    EDUCA %in% c(5) ~ "some college", 
    EDUCA %in% c(6) ~ "college graduate",
  )) 
#2019 contraception
#1~1
#2~2
#3~3
#4 or 5 or 6 ~ 4
#8 ~ 6
# 11 or 13 ~ 7
# 14 ~ 9
# 15 ~ 10
yr2022upd <- yr2022 %>% 
    select(EDUCA, EMPLOY1, MARITAL, INCOME3,PRIMINSR,'_AGEG5YR', RRCLASS3,'_SEX',BRTHCNT4,FLUSHOT7,'_HLTHPLN') %>% 
  rename(SEX = `_SEX`, AGE = `_AGEG5YR`,INCOME2 = INCOME3, HLTHCVR1 = PRIMINSR, '_PRACE1' = RRCLASS3, HLTHPLN1 = '_HLTHPLN') %>% rename(BRTHCNT = BRTHCNT4,FLUSHOT = FLUSHOT7 ) %>% mutate(Year = 2022) %>%     mutate(EDUCA = case_when(
    EDUCA %in% c(1,2,3) ~ "did not complete highschool",
    EDUCA %in% c(4) ~ "completed highschool", 
    EDUCA %in% c(5) ~ "some college", 
    EDUCA %in% c(6) ~ "college graduate",
  )) 
```


```{r}
filtered <- bind_rows(
#  yr2011upd,
  yr2017upd,
  yr2019upd,
  yr2022upd
)
datasample <- filtered %>% 
  drop_na(BRTHCNT,FLUSHOT) %>% 
  filter(SEX == 2) %>% 
  filter(AGE >= 1 & AGE <= 6) %>% 
  #mutate(RACE = `_PRACE1`)
  filter(BRTHCNT == 1 | BRTHCNT == 2 | BRTHCNT == 3 | BRTHCNT == 4 | BRTHCNT == 6 | BRTHCNT == 7 | BRTHCNT == 9 | BRTHCNT == 10 ) %>%
  filter(FLUSHOT == 1 |  FLUSHOT == 2) %>% 
   mutate(
    bc_type = case_when(
      BRTHCNT == 1  ~ "Female sterilization",
      BRTHCNT == 2  ~ "Male sterilization",
      BRTHCNT == 3  ~ "Contraceptive implant",
      BRTHCNT == 4  ~ "IUD",
      BRTHCNT == 6  ~ "Birth control pills",
      BRTHCNT == 7  ~ "Condoms",
      BRTHCNT == 9  ~ "Had sex at a time less likely to get pregnant",
      BRTHCNT == 10 ~ "Withdrawal or pulling out",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>% 
  mutate(BRTHCNT = case_when(
    BRTHCNT %in% c(1,2,3,4,5) ~ "unnatural",
    BRTHCNT %in% c(7,9,10) ~ "natural",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )) %>% 
  mutate(MARITAL = case_when(
    MARITAL %in% c(1,6) ~ "Partnered",
    MARITAL %in% c(2,3,4,5) ~ "Not Partnered",
  )) %>% 
    mutate(HLTHCVR1 = case_when(
    HLTHCVR1 %in% c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7) ~ "Yes",
    HLTHCVR1 %in% c(8) ~ "No",
  )) %>% 
    mutate(EMPLOY1 = case_when(
    EMPLOY1 %in% c(1,2) ~ "Employed",
    EMPLOY1 %in% c(3,4,5,6,8) ~ "Unemployed",
    EMPLOY1 %in% c(7) ~ "Retired"
  )) 


  

#1 - Female sterilization 
#2 - Male sterilization 
#3 contraceptive implant
#4 IUD
#6 Birth control pills 
#7 condoms
# 9 - had sex at a time less likely to be preg)
# 10 withdrawal or pulling out


```

```{r}
unique(datasample_clean$bc_type[grep("pill", tolower(datasample_clean$bc_type))])
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tableone)
library(forcats)

datasample_clean <- datasample %>%
  drop_na(BRTHCNT) %>% 
  mutate(
    SEX      = as_factor(SEX),
    AGE      = as_factor(AGE),
    EDUCA    = as_factor(EDUCA),
    EMPLOY1  = as_factor(EMPLOY1),
    MARITAL  = as_factor(MARITAL),
    RRCLASS3 = as_factor(`_PRACE1`),
    HLTHPLN = as_factor(HLTHPLN1),

    # Stratification variable
    BRTHCNT = as_factor(BRTHCNT),
    bc_type = as_factor(bc_type)
  )

vars <- c("AGE", "EDUCA", "EMPLOY1", "MARITAL",
          "INCOME3", "RRCLASS3","HLTHPLN")

tab1 <- CreateTableOne(
  vars = vars,
  strata = "BRTHCNT",
  data = datasample_clean,
  factorVars = vars,
  addOverall = TRUE   
)

print(tab1,
      showAllLevels = TRUE,
      quote = FALSE,
      noSpaces = TRUE,
      formatCat = "f")
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

# Overall total + breakdown by BRTHCNT
totals <- datasample_clean %>%
  drop_na(BRTHCNT) %>% 
  summarise(
    total_sample = n(),
    total_natural = sum(BRTHCNT == "natural", na.rm = TRUE),
    total_unnatural = sum(BRTHCNT == "unnatural", na.rm = TRUE)
  )

totals
```


```{r}

df <- datasample_clean

df$FLUSHOT <- ifelse(df$FLUSHOT == 1, 1,
                     ifelse(df$FLUSHOT == 2, 0, NA))

df$BRTHCNT <- tolower(as.character(df$BRTHCNT))
df$BRTHCNT <- ifelse(df$BRTHCNT == "unnatural", 1,
                     ifelse(df$BRTHCNT == "natural", 0, NA))

df$AGE <- as.factor(df$AGE)

df <- df[complete.cases(df), ]


df$BRTHCNT <- factor(df$BRTHCNT, levels = c(0,1))
df$FLUSHOT <- factor(df$FLUSHOT, levels = c(0,1))

tab <- xtabs(~ BRTHCNT + FLUSHOT + AGE, data = df)


is_valid <- function(x) {
  is.array(x) &&
    length(dim(x)) == 2 &&
    all(dim(x) == c(2,2)) &&
    sum(x) > 0 &&
    all(is.finite(x))
}

keep <- apply(tab, 3, is_valid)

cat("Dropped AGE strata:\n")
print(dimnames(tab)[[3]][!keep])

tab <- tab[, , keep, drop = FALSE]


stopifnot(
  length(dim(tab)) == 3,
  all(dim(tab)[1:2] == c(2,2)),
  !any(is.na(tab)),
  all(apply(tab, 3, sum) > 0)
)


tab
```

```{r}
df <- datasample_clean


df$FLUSHOT <- ifelse(df$FLUSHOT == 1, 1,
                     ifelse(df$FLUSHOT == 2, 0, NA))

# natural = 0 (reference), unnatural = 1 (exposed)
df$BRTHCNT <- tolower(as.character(df$BRTHCNT))
df$BRTHCNT <- ifelse(df$BRTHCNT == "natural", 0,
                     ifelse(df$BRTHCNT == "unnatural", 1, NA))

df$AGE <- as.factor(df$AGE)

df <- df[complete.cases(df[, c("BRTHCNT", "FLUSHOT", "AGE")]), ]


tab <- xtabs(~ BRTHCNT + FLUSHOT + AGE, data = df)

keep <- apply(tab, 3, function(x)
  is.matrix(x) &&
  all(dim(x) == c(2,2)) &&
  sum(x) > 0
)

tab <- tab[, , keep, drop = FALSE]


a <- tab["1","1",]  # unnatural
b <- tab["1","0",]
c <- tab["0","1",]  # natural (REFERENCE)
d <- tab["0","0",]


a <- a + 0.5
b <- b + 0.5
c <- c + 0.5
d <- d + 0.5

mh_pr <- sum(a * (c + d) / (a + b)) /
         sum(c * (a + b) / (c + d))

se_log <- sqrt(1/sum(a) + 1/sum(c))

ci_low <- exp(log(mh_pr) - 1.96 * se_log)
ci_high <- exp(log(mh_pr) + 1.96 * se_log)


crude <- aggregate(FLUSHOT ~ BRTHCNT, df, mean)


table2 <- data.frame(
  Group = c("Natural (ref)", "Unnatural"),
  Crude_Prevalence = c(
    crude$FLUSHOT[crude$BRTHCNT == 0],
    crude$FLUSHOT[crude$BRTHCNT == 1]
  ),
  MH_PR = c(1, mh_pr),
  CI_Lower = c(1, ci_low),
  CI_Upper = c(1, ci_high)
)

table2
```

**LOOK AT THIS BLOCK OF CODE BELOW FOR TABLE2 OUTPUT
```{r}
colnames(df)
```


```{r}

df <- datasample_clean

# Recode FLUSHOT
df$FLUSHOT <- ifelse(df$FLUSHOT == 1, 1,
                     ifelse(df$FLUSHOT == 2, 0, NA))

# Recode exposure (natural = reference)
df$BRTHCNT <- tolower(as.character(df$BRTHCNT))
df$BRTHCNT <- ifelse(df$BRTHCNT == "natural", "natural",
                     ifelse(df$BRTHCNT == "unnatural", "unnatural", NA))

df <- df[complete.cases(df[, c("BRTHCNT", "FLUSHOT")]), ]

# Set reference group
df$BRTHCNT <- factor(df$BRTHCNT)
df$BRTHCNT <- relevel(df$BRTHCNT, ref = "natural")


get_stats <- function(g) {
  
  exposed <- df$FLUSHOT[df$BRTHCNT == g]
  ref <- df$FLUSHOT[df$BRTHCNT == "natural"]
  
  a <- sum(exposed == 1)
  b <- sum(exposed == 0)
  c <- sum(ref == 1)
  d <- sum(ref == 0)
  
  pr <- (a / (a + b)) / (c / (c + d))
  
  se_log <- sqrt(1/a - 1/(a + b) + 1/c - 1/(c + d))
  
  ci_low <- exp(log(pr) - 1.96 * se_log)
  ci_high <- exp(log(pr) + 1.96 * se_log)
  
  crude <- mean(exposed)
  
  data.frame(
    Group = g,
    Crude_Prevalence = crude,
    MH_PR = pr,
    CI_Lower = ci_low,
    CI_Higher = ci_high
  )
}

# non-ref group only
table2 <- do.call(rbind,
                  lapply(setdiff(levels(df$BRTHCNT), "natural"), get_stats))

# reference row
ref_row <- data.frame(
  Group = "natural",
  Crude_Prevalence = mean(df$FLUSHOT[df$BRTHCNT == "natural"]),
  MH_PR = 1,
  CI_Lower = 1,
  CI_Higher = 1
)

table2 <- rbind(ref_row, table2)

# Sort by crude prevalence
table2 <- table2[order(table2$Crude_Prevalence), ]

table2

```
**LOOK AT THIS BLOCK OF CODE BELOW FOR TABLE2 OUTPUT

```{r}

df <- datasample

# Recode FLUSHOT
df$FLUSHOT <- ifelse(df$FLUSHOT == 1, 1,
                     ifelse(df$FLUSHOT == 2, 0, NA))

# Clean and classify bc_type
df$bc_type <- trimws(tolower(as.character(df$bc_type)))

df$bc_type <- case_when(
  df$bc_type %in% c("female sterilization", "male sterilization") ~ "sterilization",
  grepl("implant", df$bc_type) ~ "contraceptive implant",
  df$bc_type == "iud" ~ "iud",
  grepl("pill", df$bc_type) ~ "birth control pills",
  grepl("condom", df$bc_type) ~ "condoms",
  grepl("less likely", df$bc_type) ~ "timing/rhythm",
  grepl("withdrawal|pulling out", df$bc_type) ~ "withdrawal",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)

df <- df[complete.cases(df[, c("bc_type", "FLUSHOT")]), ]

# FORCE reference category
df$bc_type <- factor(df$bc_type)
df$bc_type <- relevel(df$bc_type, ref = "withdrawal")

# Function to compute PR + CI vs withdrawal
get_stats <- function(g) {
  
  exposed <- df$FLUSHOT[df$bc_type == g]
  ref <- df$FLUSHOT[df$bc_type == "withdrawal"]
  
  a <- sum(exposed == 1)
  b <- sum(exposed == 0)
  c <- sum(ref == 1)
  d <- sum(ref == 0)
  
  pr <- (a / (a + b)) / (c / (c + d))
  
  se_log <- sqrt(1/a - 1/(a + b) + 1/c - 1/(c + d))
  
  ci_low <- exp(log(pr) - 1.96 * se_log)
  ci_high <- exp(log(pr) + 1.96 * se_log)
  
  crude <- mean(exposed)
  
  data.frame(
    Birth_Control_Type = g,
    Crude_Prevalence = crude,
    MH_PR = pr,
    CI_Lower = ci_low,
    CI_Higher = ci_high
  )
}

table2 <- do.call(rbind,
                  lapply(setdiff(levels(df$bc_type), "withdrawal"), get_stats))

ref_row <- data.frame(
  Birth_Control_Type = "withdrawal",
  Crude_Prevalence = mean(df$FLUSHOT[df$bc_type == "withdrawal"]),
  MH_PR = 1,
  CI_Lower = 1,
  CI_Higher = 1
)

table2 <- rbind(ref_row, table2)

# Sort
table2 <- table2[order(table2$Birth_Control_Type), ]

table2
table2 <- table2[order(table2$Crude_Prevalence), ]
table2
```

```{r}
df
```



```{r}
apply(mh.2by2, 3, function(x) {
  matrix(x, 2, 2)
})
```

```{r}
unique(df$bc_type[grep("pill", tolower(df$bc_type))])
```


```{r}
apply(mh.2by2, 3, function(x) {
  any(x == 0)
})
```

** COUNFOUNDER ADJUSTMENT

```{r}
df <- datasample_clean

# Recode outcome
df$FLUSHOT <- ifelse(df$FLUSHOT == 1, 1,
                     ifelse(df$FLUSHOT == 2, 0, NA))

# Recode exposure
df$BRTHCNT <- tolower(as.character(df$BRTHCNT))
df$BRTHCNT <- ifelse(df$BRTHCNT == "natural", "natural",
                     ifelse(df$BRTHCNT == "unnatural", "unnatural", NA))


confounders <- c("EDUCA","MARITAL",
                 "AGE",
                 "RRCLASS3","HLTHPLN","EMPLOY1")

df <- df[complete.cases(df[, c(confounders, "BRTHCNT", "FLUSHOT")]), ]

df$BRTHCNT <- factor(df$BRTHCNT)
df$BRTHCNT <- relevel(df$BRTHCNT, ref = "natural")

# Strata definition
df$strata <- interaction(df[, confounders], drop = TRUE)

get_stats <- function(g) {

  d <- df[df$BRTHCNT %in% c("natural", g), ]
  strata_list <- split(d, d$strata)

  num <- 0
  den <- 0

  for (s in strata_list) {

    a <- sum(s$FLUSHOT == 1 & s$BRTHCNT == g, na.rm = TRUE)
    b <- sum(s$FLUSHOT == 0 & s$BRTHCNT == g, na.rm = TRUE)
    c <- sum(s$FLUSHOT == 1 & s$BRTHCNT == "natural", na.rm = TRUE)
    d0 <- sum(s$FLUSHOT == 0 & s$BRTHCNT == "natural", na.rm = TRUE)

    if ((a + b + c + d0) == 0) next

    
    if (any(c(a,b,c,d0) == 0)) {
      a <- a + 0.5
      b <- b + 0.5
      c <- c + 0.5
      d0 <- d0 + 0.5
    }

    n <- a + b + c + d0

    num <- num + a * (c + d0) / n
    den <- den + c * (a + b) / n
  }

  rr_mh <- num / den

  log_rr <- log(rr_mh)
  se <- sqrt(1/num + 1/den)

  ci_low <- exp(log_rr - 1.96 * se)
  ci_high <- exp(log_rr + 1.96 * se)

  data.frame(
    Group = g,
    Crude_Prevalence = mean(df$FLUSHOT[df$BRTHCNT == g]),
    MH_PR = rr_mh,
    CI_Lower = ci_low,
    CI_Higher = ci_high
  )
}

table2 <- do.call(rbind,
                  lapply(setdiff(levels(df$BRTHCNT), "natural"), get_stats))

# reference row
ref_row <- data.frame(
  Group = "natural",
  Crude_Prevalence = mean(df$FLUSHOT[df$BRTHCNT == "natural"]),
  MH_PR = 1,
  CI_Lower = 1,
  CI_Higher = 1
)

table2 <- rbind(ref_row, table2)

# sort
table2 <- table2[order(table2$Crude_Prevalence), ]

table2
```

```{r}
df <- datasample

# Recode outcome
df$FLUSHOT <- ifelse(df$FLUSHOT == 1, 1,
                     ifelse(df$FLUSHOT == 2, 0, NA))

# Clean and classify bc_type
df$bc_type <- trimws(tolower(as.character(df$bc_type)))

df$bc_type <- case_when(
  df$bc_type %in% c("female sterilization", "male sterilization") ~ "sterilization",
  grepl("implant", df$bc_type) ~ "contraceptive implant",
  df$bc_type == "iud" ~ "iud",
  grepl("pill", df$bc_type) ~ "birth control pills",
  grepl("condom", df$bc_type) ~ "condoms",
  grepl("less likely", df$bc_type) ~ "timing/rhythm",
  grepl("withdrawal|pulling out", df$bc_type) ~ "withdrawal",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)


confounders <- c("EDUCA","MARITAL",
                 "AGE",
                 "RRCLASS3","HLTHPLN","EMPLOY1")


vars_needed <- c(confounders, "bc_type", "FLUSHOT")
vars_present <- vars_needed[vars_needed %in% names(df)]

df <- df[complete.cases(df[, vars_present]), ]

df$bc_type <- factor(df$bc_type)
df$bc_type <- relevel(df$bc_type, ref = "withdrawal")


df$strata <- interaction(df[, confounders[confounders %in% names(df)]], drop = TRUE)

get_stats <- function(g) {

  d <- df[df$bc_type %in% c("withdrawal", g), ]
  strata_list <- split(d, d$strata)

  num <- 0
  den <- 0

  for (s in strata_list) {

    a <- sum(s$FLUSHOT == 1 & s$bc_type == g, na.rm = TRUE)
    b <- sum(s$FLUSHOT == 0 & s$bc_type == g, na.rm = TRUE)
    c <- sum(s$FLUSHOT == 1 & s$bc_type == "withdrawal", na.rm = TRUE)
    d0 <- sum(s$FLUSHOT == 0 & s$bc_type == "withdrawal", na.rm = TRUE)

    if ((a + b + c + d0) == 0) next

   
    if (any(c(a,b,c,d0) == 0)) {
      a <- a + 0.5
      b <- b + 0.5
      c <- c + 0.5
      d0 <- d0 + 0.5
    }

    n <- a + b + c + d0

    num <- num + a * (c + d0) / n
    den <- den + c * (a + b) / n
  }

  rr_mh <- num / den

  log_rr <- log(rr_mh)
  se <- sqrt(1/num + 1/den)

  ci_low <- exp(log_rr - 1.96 * se)
  ci_high <- exp(log_rr + 1.96 * se)

  data.frame(
    Group = g,
    Crude_Prevalence = mean(df$FLUSHOT[df$bc_type == g]),
    MH_PR = rr_mh,
    CI_Lower = ci_low,
    CI_Higher = ci_high
  )
}


table2 <- do.call(rbind,
                  lapply(setdiff(levels(df$bc_type), "withdrawal"), get_stats))

# Reference 
ref_row <- data.frame(
  Group = "withdrawal",
  Crude_Prevalence = mean(df$FLUSHOT[df$bc_type == "withdrawal"]),
  MH_PR = 1,
  CI_Lower = 1,
  CI_Higher = 1
)

table2 <- rbind(ref_row, table2)

# Sort
table2 <- table2[order(table2$Crude_Prevalence), ]

table2
```

## extra unused code

```{r}
# Mantel–Haenszel: contraceptive method vs flu shot, stratified by age group

# Recode flu shot (assumes 1 = got shot, 2 = did not)
datasample$flu <- ifelse(datasample$FLUSHOT == 1, 1, 0)

# Fix age grouping (include upper bound)
datasample$age_group <- cut(
  datasample$AGE,
  breaks = c(18, 29, 39, 49, Inf),
  include.lowest = TRUE
)

# Keep only BRTHCNT categories 6, 9, and 10 
sub <- subset(datasample, BRTHCNT %in% c(6, 9, 10))

# Collapse categories
sub$BRTHCNT2 <- ifelse(sub$BRTHCNT == 6, "IUD", "Other_9_10")


sub$flu <- factor(sub$flu, levels = c(0, 1))
sub$BRTHCNT2 <- factor(sub$BRTHCNT2)
sub$age_group <- factor(sub$age_group)


tab <- xtabs(~ BRTHCNT2 + flu + age_group, data = sub)

# Mantel-Haenszel test
mantelhaen.test(tab)


#Age, race, healthcare access insurance, income, marriage, year, urban/rural (accessibility), education is better than income

```
